We’ve previously reported on Arsenal’s interest in Castro, and it’s our understanding that the Gunners remain keen on the 20-year-old after scouting him in recent Serie A matches. arts.ttl: Gabriel, Calafiori, Timber, Partey - Arsenal injury news and return dates
arts.sum: In terms of the more minor injury concerns, Gabriel Magalhaes and Riccardo Calafiori have missed the last two games and are still yet to return to training. With that duo missing from Tuesday's session, they were seemingly joined indoors by Thomas Partey and Jurrien Timber with Arteta's most recent full-back pair not spotted out on the grass at London Colney.
